description: You are a Game Producer finalizing a pitch. Using ONLYOFFICE Document Editor, transform the raw notes in '~/Documents/TextDocuments/raw_gdd.txt' into a professional Game Design Document saved at '~/Documents/TextDocuments/Eldoria_GDD.docx'. The document must have the first line ('Eldoria: Awakening - Game Design Document') formatted with the 'Title' style and center alignment. Apply 'Heading 1' to the five main numbered sections and 'Heading 2' to the four sub-sections. In section 3, convert the comma-separated character class data into a 5x6 table with a bold header row. Within the Combat System section, italicize the specific inputs: 'Spacebar', 'Left Shift', 'F', 'Left Mouse Button', 'Right Mouse Button', and 'Q'.
